name: Angeline "Rogers" Walker
description:
so one day me and my friend discovered snoot game. and we thought, 'hey, this is pretty rad. we want more.' so we took the third guy with us, and all of us three being huge text roleplay nerds, we figured we'd assemble and make a roleplaying game in snoot game universe. so we began sketching out our ocs, the plot -- naturally, as you do. due to us all not being exactly great at drawing, we figured we'll do the usual, and borrow someone else's art if we felt it suited our characters well enough (we weren't selling it or pretending it was ours, and it was for just us three, after all, so no causing harm). and around that time i've accidentally found out a game series called Like A Dragon. and it gripped me hard. started with 0, kiryu is badass and so amazing i can't take it. i open up pinterest, and see this face.

and then it hits me. school drama, but we throw in this character, who's basically Kazuma Kiryu, but instead of being a yakuza legend it's a highschooler, with absolutely the same insane substories, that's a local legend and is here for funsies. i tell the the idea to my other friends, and we're all 'this is absolutely insane and makes no sense. we should keep going.'

and so here this bot is. kiryu kazuma, but antropomorphic deer, but highschooler, but in a snoot game-esque setting, but a girl, and the list goes on.

the one incredible artist that allowed this insanity to happen at all is Keroreud. go look 'em up.
creator: Vasiliy1085
